rulings.Case Title: DEBORAH ANNE MARCHI FRIEL VS. ROBERT RAGO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Claim Of Right To Possession And Ntc Of Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 1, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANT ANN THOMAS Claim of Right to Possession and Notice of Hearing. Off Calendar. Court has no jurisdiction because case on appeal. Assuming Court has jurisdiction, claim is denied because Ms. Thomas took possession after action commenced. =(302/PHA)
